Gallery

Pharm. D Intern students participate in the Awareness rally and seminar conducted by Gandhi Hospital, Secunderabad.

World Heart Day

Diabetes Healthcare Tsunami

International conference on “Pharmacoeconomic and Meta Analysis”

11th Annual Day “Scintillations 2K16”

Pharm. D students have come up with a great initiative to control pollution through ‘Pollution Free Hyderabad Council (PFHC)’.

Blood donation program

A guest Lecture on ‘Empower Indian Pharmacist’

Alumni Meet

A two day National Level Symposium “Pharma Innovate 2K15”

Guest Lecture on ‘Antibiotics prophylaxis for surgical site infection’

On the occasion of International Women’s Day, Gandhi Hospital, Secunderabad conducted an awareness rally with the theme ‘save the female fetus’.

National Conference on Emerging & Re-emerging Viral outbreaks in India – Clinical Challenges & Management at CSIR-IICT-CCMB

Workshop held on “Anticoagulation – Coumadin Clinic”

A Guest Lecture on “Myocardial Infarction and its management”

Orientation Program

Blood Donation

Annual day

Batukamma Festival

CMR College of Pharmacy sponsored by the M.G.R. Educational Society and was established in the year 2005 with the objectives of providing quality education in the field of Pharmacy to the students of rural and urban areas.
